title: Ashen + Copper Age Backport Compatibility
description: Ashen Resourcepack addon — adds compatibility with the Comforts mod.
body:
Warning!

The resource pack contains 3D renders of torches and lanterns in the hand from first and third person views, which may not match your game. I advise checking out my other resource pack with the same models for vanilla torches and lanterns!

---

This addon provides modified item textures to ensure compatibility with the Copper Age Backport mod while preserving the Ashen resourcepack style.

---

If you encounter any issues, please contact me (sof_izh) on the [Ashen Discord server](https://discord.gg/k5pDjKbhdh). Do not report these issues to Aim_Boot, as this is just a fan-made addon and is not officially affiliated with the main Ashen resourcepack.

---

Credits:
- Aim_Boot – [Ashen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen) resourcepack
- Smallinger – [Copper Age Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/backport-copper-age) mod
